title: Loves of a Dictator
writer: Benn W. Levy, M. Logan, Jan Lustig
actors: Clive Brook, Madeleine Carroll, Emlyn Williams
plot: The story opens in Copenhagen in the year 1776 on the wedding night of the King and Princess Caroline Mathilde. But the marriage was a political alliance, and the Princess felt only repugnance for her dissolute husband. On the nig...
